steps.title: Complete the prepositional phrase
steps.content: The sentence needs the phrase 'achievements of artists of Latin American descent.' The preposition 'of' must connect directly to its object, 'artists.'

steps.title: Reject interrupting punctuation
steps.content: Choice A inserts a semicolon after a preposition. Choice B inserts a colon after a preposition. Choice C inserts a comma between the preposition and its object. Each breaks the phrase. The remaining choice uses no punctuation between 'of' and 'artists.' The answer is D.
